chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4135 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Office Objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 28.01.2026. No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioners and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the Order Sheet reflects that this was also the case on the previous date, all of which suggest that the Petitioners have lost interest in the Petition, which stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
